process.commandLine:
python -c "import urllib.request
import socket

print('Testing network firewall enforcement...')
print('')

# Test 1: Try to connect to allowed host (should succeed)
print('Test 1: Connecting to allowed host (api.github.com)...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com', timeout=10)
    print(f'  SUCCESS: Connected to api.github.com (status: {response.status})')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  ERROR: Failed to connect to api.github.com: {e}')

print('')

# Test 2: Try to connect to blocked host (should fail/timeout)
print('Test 2: Connecting to blocked host (google.com)...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://google.com', timeout=5)
    print(f'  ERROR: Should not have been able to connect to google.com!')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  SUCCESS: Connection to google.com was blocked as expected: {type(e).__name__}')

print('')
print('Network firewall test complete')"
